name: Apple Breakfast Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix whole wheat and all-purpose flours.
2. Add sugar, apricots, prunes, raisins, bran, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, and baking soda to the flour mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Mix yogurt, oil, and eggs in another bowl.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir just until combined.
5. Spread the batter evenly in a greased 9-inch square cake pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a rack.
8. Cut into bars. Bars can be stored in an airtight container for up to 3 days, or individually wrapped and frozen for up to 1 month.
